mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, owner_uid, project_uid, project_code, project_name, project_desc, project_status, project_mark, flow_check, flow_approve, flow_execute, options
mapper.select:
select
from dm_project where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and project_status != 'DELETE' and project_name like concat('%',#{param.searchKeywords},'%') and project_mark = #{param.mark} and project_status = #{param.status} order by gmt_create desc

select
from dm_project where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id in #{item} order by gmt_create desc

select
from dm_project where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{projectId} order by gmt_create desc
mapper.update: update dm_project set project_uid = #{newData}, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{projectId}
update dm_project set project_name = #{newData}, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{projectId}
update dm_project set project_desc = #{newData}, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{projectId}
update dm_project set project_status = #{newData,javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.project.ProjectStatus}, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{projectId}
update dm_project set project_mark = #{newData}, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{projectId}

update dm_project set flow_check = #{project.flowCheck, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.project.ChangeCheckStrategy}, flow_approve = #{project.flowApprove, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.project.ChangeApproveStrategy}, flow_execute = #{project.flowExecute, javaType=com.clougence.clouddm.platform.dal.model.project.ChangeExecStrategy}, options = #{project.options, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, gmt_modified = now() where owner_uid = #{ownerUid} and id = #{projectId}
